sections.title: After In Aid of the Myreque

lines.speaker: Cornelius
lines.text: Hey it's the hero! Thank you so much for saving us from Gadderanks. And the town is looking lovely as well. You've done a great job!

lines.speaker: Cornelius
lines.text: I'm Cornelius. I run the bank now.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do you like your town?

lines.speaker: Cornelius
lines.text: It's just perfect. Thanks so much for your efforts.

lines.speaker: Cornelius
lines.text: Oh, not much really. We're all still hiding from the vampyres and eking out a living from this terrible place.

lines.speaker: Cornelius
lines.text: Hopefully soon we'll be strong enough to make the journey across the Salve.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Is there anything I can do to help out?

lines.speaker: Cornelius
lines.text: Not as far as I know. We have some basic amenities now which is so very useful and we're all incredibly grateful to you.

lines.speaker: Cornelius
lines.text: I've never really seen or known a hero before, so I have nothing to compare one to, but I suspect in most people's judgement, you would be one! I for one am very pleased to have met you.
